query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A black and white image of a spider with long, thin legs radiating outward from a central body, centered against a plain white background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white image of a spider with long, thin legs radiating outward from a central body against a plain white background, rendered with heavy intentional motion blur and soft focus that creates a dynamic, ghostly effect; fine textures and structural details throughout the subject are smeared and dissolved into ambiguous, hazy streaks lacking clear form.
